name: edge-agents
description: Root launcher for the fh-workflow CLI. Delegates to ts/workflow-cli; no dependencies of its own.

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix ts install && npm --prefix ts run build
scripts.validate: npm run core:build && node ts/workflow-cli/cli/fh-workflow.mjs validate
scripts.check-schema: npm run core:build && node ts/workflow-cli/cli/fh-workflow.mjs check-schema
scripts.open: npm run core:build && node ts/workflow-cli/cli/fh-workflow.mjs open
scripts.update: npm run core:build && node ts/workflow-cli/cli/fh-workflow.mjs update
scripts.deploy: npm run core:build && node ts/workflow-cli/cli/fh-workflow.mjs deploy
